chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 775 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 3508/21 3. For hearing of main case 11-04-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.4&5, Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** Learned counsel for the respondents No.4&5 contends that the respondents No.4&5 have forwarded application of the petitioner for his appointment on deceased quota, which is pending with the Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition in terms that the application of the petitioner shall be decided by the Secretary, Local Government Department within two months hereof, for that learned AAG and learned counsel for the respondents No.4&5 record their no objection. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of along with listed application by directing the Secretary Local Government Department, Government of Sindh (respondent No.1) to decide the application of the petitioner for his appointment under deceased quota, forwarded to him by the respondents No.4&5 within two weeks hereof under compliance report to this Court through Additional Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
